title: Build the first vertical slice: collect CloudWatch events into Virtuus

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Demo-first vertical slice implemented: features/demo_vertical_slice.feature, Python package (caducus.cli demo ingest|run, analyze), canonical events + Virtuus storage, demo_dataset collector (HDFS-style CSV), biblicus_adapter. pytest and behave pass; CLI demo run produces structured topic output.
